data.input: {"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "What's our MRR trend over the last quarter?"}]}
data.name: LangGraph

data.input: {"query": "SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', billing_date) AS month, SUM(monthly_amount) AS mrr FROM subscriptions WHERE billing_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '3 months' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month"}

data.output: {"answer": "MRR grew from $412.8K (Mar) \u2192 $438.5K (Apr) \u2192 $461.2K (May). Quarter-over-quarter growth of ~11.7%, with consistent month-over-month acceleration."}
